programme.title: Aunty Lee's Deadly Delights
programme.desc: The Great Nyonya Cook-Off begins disastrously when Aunty Lee is disqualified before the competition even heats up. Can the gang help her reclaim her reputation — and prove who the real master chef is?

programme.title: CSI: Vegas S3

programme.title: The Cube Australia
programme.desc: Hosted by Andy Lee,, The Cube Australia sees competing pairs have nine lives to complete seven games, each worth an increasing amount of money, as they move closer to the huge jackpot. With key moments filmed using state-of-the-art bullet time' 3D time-freezing technology, it is more than a regular game show. It brings blockbuster visuals and Hollywood high tension direct to your living room. Will anyone have what it takes to beat the Cube?

programme.title: Raid The Cage: Season 02
programme.desc: Two teams of two compete to take prizes from the Cage before the time limit expires and the doors close. Correct answers adds seconds to the clock, allowing to claim more rewards from the Cage. The winning team keeps what they grabbed.

programme.title: Cosmicrew S1
programme.desc: Meet the cosmic rangers - courageous team leader Storm the tiger, fun-loving man of action Flash the monkey and science genius Rainbow the rabbit! From the Cosmicrew Base - their headquarters on Earth - the cosmic rangers launch into mission after mission, helping animals across the globe using not only their high-tech Cosmicrew gear, but also their own strength, courage and smarts. Every exciting encounter helps Storm, Flash and Rainbow discover the amazing abilities each animal possesses.

programme.title: Ghostforce
programme.desc: Liv, Andy, and Mike are three teens who form the ultra-secret Ghostforce, a squad of superheroes with ghostly powers! programme.title: John Torode's Asia
programme.desc: In this episode John Torode is in the tropical island paradise of Maldives in the Indian Ocean to explore its two sides: local life and the glossy 5-star resorts. John's first outing takes him to the local island of Huraa. Huraa is in Malé Atholhu, one of the country's 26 atolls. Here he meets Soba, who gives him an introduction to Maldivian cuisine by cooking a typical local dish for him using coconuts, chilies & tuna fish called Mas Fen Dhiya.

programme.title: Leverage: Redemption S3
programme.desc: Parker decides to take down a local factory kingpin using child labor. While the villain spins his own version of how he was wrongfully destroyed, the team tries to unravel the con Parker's running as a solo side job or is she? The team must play catch up as they find themselves drafted into her machinations.

programme.title: Animal Impossible
programme.desc: Tim Warwood and Adam Gendle risk life and limb to uncover the truth about animals in this eye-opening and entertaining series. Do cats always land on their feet? Could a squid sink a ship? Is spider silk really stronger than steel? The intrepid pair quiz experts and conduct audacious stunts - including a nerve-wracking swim with a great white shark - to get answers. But they find more than they expected, discovering a whole host of strange and remarkable truths about the animal kingdom.

programme.title: Films & Stars

programme.title: Planet Action S4
programme.desc: Planet Action takes you behind the scenes of the best action movies released. Each episode you'll get all the secrets straight from your favorite action heroes, get exclusive trivia and special reports from the most dangerous film sets, and get insight information on how the filmmakers make giant monsters come to life. This show is a sci-fi, cowboy, world-destruction, action-combo that will literally blow your mind!

programme.title: Zak & Wowo: The Legend of Lendarys
programme.desc: Thirteen year old Zak goes in search of his twin brother Kyle, who has disappeared mysteriously. Equipped with a magical jade stone whose superpowers he doesn't yet know how to control, he is joined by his grandmother NaiNai, Indiana, a beautiful outlaw who can communicate with fantastical creatures, and Wowo, formerly a 3 meter-tall furry pachyderm, now turned into a tiny, cute and wacky furball by the magical jade stone.

programme.title: What On Earth
programme.desc: Zachary suggests that Raffles takes everyone camping this weekend, mostly to give Zachary a break from them all. Unfortunately, both Raffles and Leonardo develop a toothache. They take an all-purpose Zetabian pain-killer, only to start turning blue literally. Raffles and Leonardo return to the apartment to discover that Neela has turned the living room into a camp-in.

programme.title: What On Earth
programme.desc: The "campers" wake next morning to find they still have toothache... but that Neela has disappeared. Zachary and Raffles know she won't last a minute out in nature. They have to find her! After an unsuccessful search, Neela turns up again, having spent the night in comfort on the ship. She also has a device to help with the toothache..

programme.desc: 为了保护海洋生命免受污染与环境威胁勇敢善良的帮帮龙们成立了海洋救援队他们与安仔祖儿和卢卡斯一起深入海洋世界近距离观察生物习性并与海洋生物成为了朋友在帮助他们解决各种难题的过程中帮帮龙和孩子们不仅收获成长也深刻认识到了所有的生物都应该和谐相处并且共同守护地球家园.

programme.desc: The drama 'Cut Amirah' starts with the background of the 2004 tsunami in Acheh, progressing to the year 2011. programme.title: Kaimatru Man vs Life
programme.desc: Kaimatru- Man vs Life is a reality show envisioned to help us see life from the eyes of those with less privilege than us, be it monetary, social, cultural, or often all three combined. With this show, we endeavour to touch a chord with the viewer and thus, help them hear the song of life that is melodiously playing in their lives. The show features 13 local celebrities and makes them exchange their life with someone less fortunate across India.
